card_name_verified: One Key+™ Card (Wells Fargo / Expedia Group, $99 AF)

recurring_credits.name: OneKeyCash Anniversary Credit
recurring_credits.description: $100 in OneKeyCash each cardholder anniversary year. OneKeyCash redeems 1:1 USD on Expedia, Hotels.com, and Vrbo bookings. Unconditional anniversary bestowal.
recurring_credits.source_excerpt: $100 in OneKeyCash each year on your cardholder anniversary

recurring_credits.name: Trusted Traveler Credit (Global Entry/TSA PreCheck)
recurring_credits.description: Up to $120 statement credit for Global Entry or TSA PreCheck application fee, once every four years.
recurring_credits.source_excerpt: earn a one statement credit up to $120 for a Trusted Traveler Program, such as Global Entry or TSA PreCheck (once every four years)

_review_reason: Kacey confirmed 2026-04-28: OneKeyCash $100 anniversary classified as USD recurring credit (1:1 fixed conversion to Expedia/Hotels.com/Vrbo, unconditional, platform-locked but USD-denominated — analogous to Hilton Aspire Resort Credit and Delta Stays credit treatment).
